heroHeadline: US Envoy Presses Taiwan Legislature on NT$1.25T Defense Bill; PLA Maintains 6 Sorties/Day Pattern
heroSubtitle: NT$1.25T special defense budget stalled in committee with only 2 articles passed; HIMARS LOA signed before deadline; Trump-Xi summit rescheduled to May 14–15
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
